title: Duel in the Sun
director: King Vidor, Otto Brower, William Dieterle
writer: David O. Selznick, Niven Busch, Oliver H.P. Garrett
actors: Jennifer Jones, Joseph Cotten, Gregory Peck
plot: Beautiful, biracial Pearl Chavez becomes the ward of her dead father's first love and finds herself torn between two brothers, one good and the other bad.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 3 wins & 4 nominations total
